data.title: BlackRock's Explainer Sparks FUD On Bitcoin's 21 Million Supply Cap: Changes Theoretically Possible But 'Unlikely,' Says Analyst
data.description: The world's largest asset manager, BlackRock, raised eyebrows on Wednesday after including a line in an explainer video that supposedly disputed Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) finite supply thesis.

data.title: Elon Musk A Legendary Entrepreneur But Also A Bully, Says OpenAI CEO Sam Altman: 'Now It's Me, It's Been Bezos, Gates, Zuckerberg, Lots Of Other People'
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman praised Elon Musk as a legendary entrepreneur but criticized him as a "bully," highlighting Musk's history of conflicts with other tech leaders and ongoing legal battles with OpenAI.
